title: Combining two accounts
excerpt: I have been invited to another firms Monday.com account as a guest. Can I link my companies account and theirs in one place? Will I have to log out and log in to each account every time I want to work on the boards?

posts.author: JAL72 (Josh)
posts.cookedHtml: I have been invited to another firms Monday.com account as a guest. Can I link my companies account and theirs in one place? Will I have to log out and log in to each account every time I want to work on the boards?

posts.author: DanIngham-IOI (Dan Ingham IOI / BPX)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Josh
Under your avatar section you should be able to see Switch accounts (top right of the panel)
You should be able to switch between any account you have access to here
without having to log out/in all the time

Hope this helps let me know it this is what you where looking for
Many thanks Dan
